---
title: "Trucktrack filter pipeline"
subtitle: "Cleaning and segmenting truck GPS traces"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
---

{{< include 00-pipeline.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-stale.qmd >}}

{{< include 02-speed.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-gap.qmd >}}

{{< include 04-stop.qmd >}}

{{< include 05-traffic.qmd >}}
